summary: The South Bay's funding frenzy continues: SiFive secured $400M in Santa Clara, while Nexthop AI (Santa Clara) and Rhoda AI (Palo Alto) each closed mega rounds above $400M in March. Most of the region's startup ecosystem remains stable, with seven companies actively hiring, though a handful are tightening belts. Meanwhile, San Jose State hosts two tech-focused talks this week on hiring and AI in legal work.
